title: mentha aromatica
intro: Mentha aromatica, also known as Woolly Mint or Horsemint, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its hairy leaves and purple flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Mentha aromatica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections, making it a popular remedy for respiratory problems and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Woolly Mint include teas, infusions, and topical creams, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall health and well-being.
